hero.description: Horizon Tech d.o.o. ke khamphani ya theknolotši ya lefase ka bophara yeo e lego ka Sarajevo, e aba ditharollo tša software tša maemo a godimo go dikgwebo go kgabaganya dikontinente tše tharo.

mission.title: Thomo
mission.description: Re thuša mekgatlo go fetoša dikgopolo tše kgolo go ba ditšweletšwa tša titšithale tše di tshephagalago tšeo di hlolago mohola wa kgwebo wo o ka lekanywago.
points: Align technology delivery with clear business results.
Aga ditshepedišo tša lebaka le letelele tšeo di tšwelago pele ge dihlopha di gola.
Dirišana kgauswi le bakgathatema go tloga ka leano go fihla ka tiragatšo.

expertise.title: Bokgoni
expertise.description: Dihlopha tša rena tša go fapafapana di kopanya botebo bja boentšeneere le dikgopolo tša setšweletšwa go kgabaganya theknolotši ya sebjalebjale.
points: Cloud architecture, DevOps automation, and resilient infrastructure.
Applied AI/ML, data workflows, and IoT-enabled products.

approach.title: Mokgwa
approach.description: Re dira ka mokgwa wo o bonagalago, wa iterative wo o dirago gore kabo e bonagale mola e fokotša kotsi ya setšweletšwa.
points: Discover: define scope, priorities, and success metrics early.
Build: ship in focused increments with continuous feedback loops.
Optimize: Monitor results and improve performance over time.

cta.title: Na o ikemišeditše go fetoša kgwebo ya gago?

hamza.bio: Visionary leader and technical architect with 10+ years in enterprise software, specializing in AI/ML, cloud platforms, and scalable product architecture.

ahmet.bio: Cybersecurity specialist focused on enterprise security architecture, secure on-prem infrastructure, and compliance-first delivery for regulated environments.

innovation.description: 20% ya nako ya diprotšeke tša motho ka noši, di-hackathon le dinyakišišo tše mpsha.

cta.title: Na o nyaka go tsenela sehlopha sa rena?

hero.description: Join a team of engineers building cutting-edge software for global clients. Šoma kgole, gola ka mehla gomme o be le seabe sa mmakgonthe.

hero.description: Bona ka moo re thušitšego dikhamphani go ralala le diintasteri go fetoša mešomo ka theknolotši ye e šomago gabotse.

faqs.question: What services does Horizon Tech offer?
faqs.answer: Re fana ka tlhabollo ya software ya tlwaelo, ditharollo tša AI/ML, boagišani bja maru, DevOps, bohlale bja kgwebo le ditirelo tša IoT.

faqs.question: Na nka thoma bjang projeke ka Horizon Tech?
faqs.answer: Ikgokaganye le rena ka foromo goba ka emeile ge o bolela ka dinyakwa tša gago. Re tla beakanya mogala wa go utolla le go abelana tšhišinyo.

faqs.question: Na o fana ka thekgo le thekgo ya ka mehla?
faqs.answer: Ee. Re fana ka diphuthelwana tša thekgo le tlhokomelo tšeo di akaretšago diphošollo tša diphošo, dimpshafatšo tša tšhireletšo le dikaonafatšo tša dikarolo.
